title: Createmon
description: A mostly vanilla experience with Create + Cobblemon. Also has Fabric Seasons.
body:
This is a modpack for my retired Minecraft server. You can use this for your own stuff if you'd like!

This modpack contains 3 main mods. Cobblemon, Create, and Fabric Seasons. Everything else is performance! The point of this modpack is to create an almost completely vanilla experience while only adding content from Create & Cobblemon, which in my opinion, add onto vanilla and don't really change how you progress the game. Bored? Catch some Cobblemon! Maybe even experiment with Create.





Credits: Simply Optimized https://modrinth.com/modpack/sop - Used this modpack as a base, to include all the epic performance stuff.

**Looking for a Minecraft host? Check out [Lagless.gg](https://lagless.spellbound.sh/)**
